Home / Lore / Locations / Manhattan Dark Zone

location

Manhattan Dark Zone

The initial containment zone where first-wave Agents are abandoned and where supply drops create a dangerous scavenging economy.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Containment and abandonment

The Dark Zone begins as a containment measure but becomes the place where the first wave collapses and emergency supply flows attract scavengers, setting conditions for rogue Agents and faction power. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The immediate response to the outbreak attempts to contain it within the Dark Zone. [1]

  2. confirmed

    First-wave Division Agents are abandoned in the Dark Zone, where most are killed or go rogue. [1]

  3. confirmed

    Frequent supply drops for trapped survivors and Agents make the Dark Zone lucrative for scavengers. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: This overview covers the original Manhattan Dark Zone, not the separate Dark Zones in The Division 2.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
